# ZintIcon

> ZintIcon is a browser-based generator for creating minimalist icons with customizable gradient backgrounds and exporting them as SVG, PNG, or ICO files.

Use the web application to select an icon, customize its appearance and background, preview the result, and download the generated asset.

## Application

- [ZintIcon](https://zinticon.alexisgvrcia.dev/): Create and export customizable minimalist icons.
- [Sitemap](https://zinticon.alexisgvrcia.dev/sitemap.xml): List of public pages on the site.
- [Robots policy](https://zinticon.alexisgvrcia.dev/robots.txt): Crawler access policy.

## Source

- [Project repository](https://github.com/alexisgvrcia/zint-icon): Source code, setup instructions, and implementation details.
- [README](https://github.com/alexisgvrcia/zint-icon/blob/main/README.md): Feature overview, installation, and development instructions.
